story.text:
# ✨ Attest Frequent
**📊(small) → 🔁(often) → 👁️(visible)**
*lampyra · jeweller · V49*

Attest at high cadence. Lampyra's attestations are small, frequent, and visible — the sparkle that lets a city watch a Mage at work.

> Frequency is its own form of trust. A constant small light is a constant attestation.

*Keywords:* attest · cadence · visibility · v49
